payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Rectangular dark-brown wooden picture frame with a gilded inner trim and varnished finish, enclosing a glass-covered seascape print of sailboats; the frame shows minor scuffs and edge wear and there is slight reflection on the glass — photographed at approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"dark gilded wooden picture frame","long_description":"Rectangular dark-brown wooden picture frame with a gilded inner trim and varnished finish, enclosing a glass-covered seascape print of sailboats; the frame shows minor scuffs and edge wear and there is slight reflection on the glass — photographed at approximately 1.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown wood","gilded inner trim","rectangular","glass-covered","seascape print inside","varnished finish","corner scuffs","slight reflection/glare","wall-mounted"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
